_comment: Flyn — Mac Mini 4C. Codex OAuth subscription primary (flat-rate). Local Ollama/oMLX for heartbeats/cron/background. Gemini 2 preview for embeddings (cloud, quality-first). Lossless Claw in contextEngine slot. EmbeddingGemma local as graceful-degradation fallback. See workspace/IDENTITY.md + deploy/install-memory-stack.md.

ollama/gemma4:e4b._comment: Local heartbeat + background model. Default for all non-user-facing turns.

ollama/qwen3:8b._comment: Alternative local heartbeat model; swap in if Gemma 4 tool-call stability issues.

heartbeat._comment: Heartbeat calls go to local Gemma 4. Confirmed working on Apple Silicon via Ollama; migrate to oMLX substrate when deploy/install-memory-stack.md step 2 is done.

primary._comment: Cloud API. #1 MTEB multimodal. Preview status — monitor for GA promotion. Per ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/embeddings (verified 2026-04-20).

fallbacks._comment: Stable 3072-dim fallback if v2 preview has availability issues.
LOCAL air-gap fallback — 308M params, Matryoshka to 128. Kicks in if Gemini quota exhausts or 4C is offline.

contextEngine._comment: Slot plugin. Sidesteps compaction hallucinations (GitHub openclaw/openclaw#58137, #65218, #66947, #44787). Install per deploy/install-memory-stack.md step 1.

vectorStore._comment: OpenClaw built-in. No reason to replace at Flyn scale.

structured._comment: Entity + relationship + preference store. Official OpenClaw integration. Apache 2.0. Install per deploy/install-memory-stack.md step 6.

openai-codex._comment: Subscription OAuth — flat-rate. Re-auth: openclaw models auth login --provider openai-codex. Auth stored at ~/.openclaw/agents/main/agent/auth-profiles.json.

google-gemini._comment: Required for gemini-embedding-2-preview. Free tier generous for solo-agent embedding volumes. Secret lives in auth-profiles.json, NOT in this file.

ollama._comment: Local inference. Confirm running: `ollama list`. Models pulled per deploy/install-memory-stack.md.
